narration_text: Now we'll see how home networks connect to the headend or central office. Notice that these connections can be wired or wireless. Look at the diagram on your slide — notice how the wireless and wired devices are often combined in a single box, such as a WiFi wireless access point or a wired Ethernet router. I want you to focus on the different devices and how they interact with each other. You'll see various images on the slide, each showing a different aspect of home networks, so take a moment to observe the different components and how they fit together. As we move forward, let's keep in mind how these connections enable our online activities.
